feat.name: Running Reload
feat.text: You can reload your weapon on the move. You Stride, Step, or Sneak, then Interact to reload.

traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
